title: Skeletal bones found at municipal dumpsite
description: GEORGE NEWS - Skeletal bones believed to be...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Skeletal bones believed to be that of a human, were found in a black bag among other bags and garden refuse at the municipal dumpsite yesterday, Thursday 14 March.

The police registered an inquest case for investigation.


> A postmortem will be conducted to determine gender, race and cause of death.


Anyone with any information about this incident is kindly requested to contact the investigating officer Detective Warrant Officer Linbeni Ndwenkuku on 044 803 4715 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
